title: Properly format images JSON output
body:
This change makes the images --json output a valid JSON list.

Closes: #1257
Signed-off-by: Tristan Cacqueray <tdecacqu@redhat.com>

comments.body: Note that this is not backward compatible.
@TristanCacqueray I am not worried about the backward compatibility since i see this as a bug

@rhatdan Thanks for the prompt feedback, I also think it's a bug, but who knows, users may have workaround. I wanted to implement the fix as a "--format json" option to be similar to podman, but it was already taken.

I can rebase this after pull #1260 land and add a test too.

LGTM.  I gave it a test run or three and initially had trouble figuring out the invalid json.  It was valid prior for a single image listed, but was broken for 2 or more images listed.  Nice catch and fix @TristanCacqueray 

I'm fine with merging this now as long as it doesn't mess up #1260 progress for @TristanCacqueray

Merge this one first since it passes tests, and will have to rebase the other one.
@rh-atomic-bot r+
